motions.title: Approval of Long-Range Financial Planning Strategy
motions.summary: This strategy sets the financial course for the city for future years, influencing how services are funded and how residents' taxes are managed.
motions.full_text: That the Long-Range Financial Planning Strategy attached as Appendix 1 in the report from the Commissioner of Corporate Services, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, entitled 'LongRange Financial Planning Strategy', dated December 8, 2025, be approved.

motions.title: Approval of 2026 Budgets for Business Improvement Areas (BIAs)
motions.summary: This decision allocates funds to local business districts in Clarkson, Malton, Port Credit, Cooksville, and Streetsville, supporting their initiatives and local economies.
motions.full_text:
1. That the 2026 budget submissions for the Clarkson, Malton, Port Credit, Cooksville, and Streetsville Business Improvement Areas (BIA's), as set out in Appendix 1 of the Corporate Report dated November 28, 2025, from the Commissioner of Corporate Services, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer, entitled, '2026 Business Improvement Area Budgets', be approved;
2. That all necessary By-laws be enacted and that the necessary budget adjustments be made.
